Cork It Braselton
0
CORK IT BRASELTON
SIP, SAVOR,
and
SOCIALIZE
We are passionate about providing a memorable experience for our guests, from the quality of our drinks to the warm and inviting atmosphere of our bar. Our carefully curated wine selection features a variety of reds, whites, and sparkling wines from around the world, while our expertly crafted cocktails range from classic favorites to innovative creations.
We believe that great drinks should be paired with great food. That's why we offer a selection of small plates and sharing dishes designed to complement our drinks and provide the perfect accompaniment to your evening. Our staff is knowledgeable and friendly, always happy to recommend the perfect wine or cocktail for your taste. Click below to learn more about us.
CORK IT BRASELTON
Learn more
WINE CLUB
JOIN OUR
We carry wines from a variety of notable regions - from earthy Pinot Noirs originating in Oregon to smooth Sauvignon Blanc from New Zealand.
The best way to try them all? Join the club!
EXCLUSIVE DEALS AND EVENTS
JOIN NOW
Delicious charcuterie and cheese boards perfectly compliment your favorite wine. With a selection of decadent accompaniments from Top 100 Restaurant in America, Antebellum, you’re in for a treat!
The menu
Hand selected wines from around the world, plus delicious and classic craft cocktails! What more could you need?  Looking for a full-bodied red or crisp white? We’re sure to have a wine to pique your interest!
The drinks
Our classy interior complete with a comfortable lounge area and a full bar is the perfect space to host your next night out with friends or reserve for an event! Contact us for special event pricing and details.
The events
FOLLOW US ON INSTAGRAM

--- Page: /about ---
About — Cork It Braselton
0
CORK IT BRASELTON
Cork It is an inspiration of our travels to wine appellations across the world.
Through visiting a variety of local wineries, wine shops, and homestyle bars, we have brought together our favorite wines, meats, and cheeses.
We strive to provide an inviting atmosphere that brings people together over a bottle of wine.
MEET THE TEAM
Jim Tortorelli
Co-Owner and Founder
Jim Tortorelli is a retired entrepreneur following his dreams of being in the beer and wine business. He is the owner of the hometown favorite, Tap It Growlers, located on highway 60. Jim has been a part of the Gainesville community since 2016, and is involved in many organizations.
Jim recently opened Cork It Gainesville and Buford with business partner, Roland Stanley.
After traveling and sampling wines from around the world, Jim is excited to bring a small taste of his expertise, experience, and favorite wines to both Cork It locations.
Brian Espanol
Co- Owner
Brian Espanol has worked in the service industry his whole life. Brian studied Communications/Public Relations from Valdosta State University. Throughout school, he managed multiple restaurants, from mom and pop to corporate locations. Using this knowledge, he has taken the best parts from different businesses and incorporated them into his management style.
Brian discovered his love of wine and spirits from working in alcohol sales. He was able to sample wines from all over the world with his 6 year career with Empire Distributors. In that time, he was able to learn how different wines and spirits were made. The art of making wine always fascinated him and gave him a deep appreciation for it.
Brian moved from Valdosta to Gainesville in 2011. His motto is “If you’re having a good time I’m having a great time.”
